title: WATCH:  6-year-old son helps father coach hoops team
fullText: 6-year-old son helps father coach hoops teamABC News' Danny New talks to a 6-year-old boy who's becoming famous on social media by assisting his father in coaching a high school basketball team.March 2, 2026
summary: ABC News' Danny New talks to a 6-year-old boy who's becoming famous on social media by assisting his father in coaching a high school basketball team.
